svg.title: Component selection pipeline flowchart
svg.desc: A top-down flowchart showing the full drone component selection pipeline from user inputs to validation output.

g.text: Flight time · Max altitude · Mission type

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain how max propeller diameter is derived from frame size and configuration')
g.text: Quad → ⅔ arm len · Hex → ⅓ arm len · arm = frame/2

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How is max thrust per motor calculated from MTOW and TWR?')
sendPrompt('How are propellers selected by size and coefficient of thrust?')
g.text: Filter by max diameter · rank by Ct (thrust coefficient)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How is max RPM at altitude computed and filtered?')
g.text: Compute RPM at max altitude per propeller
Achieve required thrust · filter RPM above motor DB max

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the cell count / KV table computation: RPM = KV × V × η')
g.text: Build cell count / KV table per propeller
Output: ordered list of prop → (cell count, KV) pairs

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the motor selection loop work across candidate propellers?')
g.text: Match: lowest cell count · KV · RPM · prop-motor interface
Try next prop if no motor found

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How is the battery weight budget computed from MTOW?')
sendPrompt('How is the battery selected from the weight budget, cell count, and power draw?')
g.text: Weight budget · cell count · motor power consumption

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How is maximum travel distance and flight time computed after battery selection?')

g.text: Within a few % of requested range

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Which components are selected after the battery in the pipeline?')
g.text: ESCs, FC, GPS, frame — existing logic unchanged
